name: Dogwood Hills
description: Dogwood Hills is a place to play pickleball in Brewton, AL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: RT Johnson Park
description: Come play pickleball at RT Johnson Park in East Brewton, AL! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.
